_comment: Claude Code spec-ACP fixture SKELETON (Cohort-A readiness). Drives the Generic ACP Framework's Protocol+Acceptance gates in-process via the provider-agnostic replay agent (runCodexFixtureAgent). NOT a recording of the real claude-code-acp binary — the real wire contract (authenticate ordering, session/new params, ContentBlock shape, exact authMethods ids) is UNVERIFIED and MUST be confirmed against the real binary at Claude Code's own live validation before this descriptor is trusted. Shape mirrors the reconciled spec ACP lifecycle: initialize -> authenticate -> session/new -> session/prompt (agent_message_chunk + tool_call + request_permission + terminal stopReason).
